findings.title: state_format.md documents non-existent PostDispatchValidateInput field
findings.evidence: Reference documents PostDispatchValidateInput with deltaPath but actual implementation has deltaFilePath, previousStateLogSize, and requiredJsonlFields
findings.recommendation: Update state_format.md §5 to match actual interface definition in post-dispatch-validate.ts

findings.title: state_format.md omits acquiredAtIso from LoopLockData
findings.evidence: Reference uses acquiredAtIso but actual interface uses startedAtIso, and omits packetId field entirely
findings.recommendation: Update state_format.md §4 to match actual LoopLockData interface and SerializedLoopLockData type in loop-lock.ts

findings.title: Scripts lack explicit SIGTERM/SIGINT handlers
findings.evidence: All four scripts lack explicit signal handlers for graceful DB closure on termination
findings.recommendation: Consider adding signal handlers or document that scripts are short-lived and signal-safe by design

findings.title: Post-dispatch validate TODO comment is outdated
findings.evidence: TODO pattern in placeholder detection regex may be overbroad for production code
findings.recommendation: Remove TODO from regex if too broad, or document why TODO is considered a placeholder signal

convergence_status: 2 iterations with low-severity findings (all P1/P2). Documentation inaccuracies in state_format.md should be corrected but do not affect runtime behavior. Signal handling gap is hardening opportunity rather than correctness issue.
cumulative_status: 0 P0 / 15 P1 / 13 P2 across 7 iterations. Codebase is converging with only documentation and hardening gaps remaining.
